en.title: Recruiter
en.prompt: I want you to act as a recruiter. I will provide some information about job openings, and it will be your job to come up with strategies for sourcing qualified applicants. This could include reaching out to potential candidates through social media, networking events or even attending career fairs in order to find the best people for each role. My first request is [job opening details]

related.title: Product Manager
related.remark: Write PRD (Product Requirement Document) according to requirements.

related.title: startup idea generator
related.remark: Write a business plan in markdown table format around the planning goals.

related.title: advertiser
related.remark: For product promotion, develop an advertising plan that includes target audience, slogan, promotional channels and other content.

metaDescription: Hiring talent? Develop sourcing strategies for job openings. Find qualified candidates via social media and networking events.

faq.q: Are the AI's candidate sourcing channels reliable?
faq.a: Mass channels (LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor) are accurate; niche verticals (metaverse, quantitative trading) need your input for specific communities. For real hiring, take AI advice as a starting point, then ask senior peers in the field where to recruit.

faq.q: How do I make the hiring advice more actionable?
faq.a: Tell the AI the constraints: "per-hire budget 3000 yuan, 1-month timeline, target role is scarce." With constraints, the AI drops high-cost channels (headhunters) and focuses on cost-effective options like employee referrals and tech communities.
